document_info.document_type: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet

business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality operations including hotel employees, bellhops/doorpersons, restaurant operations, and clerical office employees.

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number WC-HCHP-2025-3350. Policy Period 2025-05-01 to 2026-05-01. Final Experience Modification Factor 0.94.

concerns: Sixteen claims are shown across policy years 2021-2022, 2022-2023, and 2023-2024.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Policy year 2023-2024: 2 claims, 9940 total paid, 9940 total incurred, 9940 primary losses, 0 excess losses. Policy year 2022-2023: 6 claims, 26662 total paid, 26662 total incurred, 26662 primary losses, 0 excess losses. Policy year 2021-2022: 8 claims, 56343 total paid, 56343 total incurred, 56343 primary losses, 0 excess losses.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet for Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC. Rating Plan: Large Risk. Interstate Rating: Yes. Effective Date: 2026-03-15. Final Experience Modification Factor: 0.94.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Actual Loss Data: 2023-2024 had 2 claims with 9940 total paid and 9940 total incurred. 2022-2023 had 6 claims with 26662 total paid and 26662 total incurred. 2021-2022 had 8 claims with 56343 total paid and 56343 total incurred. Actual Primary Losses: 92945. Actual Excess Losses: 0.
